features.note: log1p(hours since last AIS fix, measured against the feed's freshest observation). Primary dark-fleet signal.
Binary: current flag in the FOC list. Elevates risk only in combination with AIS darkness.

notes: v2: scored ONLY from signals derivable from the live AIS feed (dark-gap + flag-of-convenience). The v1 cargo_mismatch / port_call_anomaly / beneficial_owner_opaque / flag_changes_90d / vessel_age placeholders had NO data source and made the composite saturate near 1.0 (~95% of vessels flagged); they were removed. Restore them here (and in computeRealFeatures) once the enrichment pipeline lands. An active, non-FOC vessel scores ~0.05; a vessel dark for days under a flag of convenience clears the 0.4 review / 0.6 alert thresholds.
